scenes.title: The Bakery Shelf
scenes.background_prompt: A bakery display case with glass shelves, a marble countertop, a chalkboard menu on the wall, and warm golden lighting. No people, no food items on the main shelf.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A bakery with warm golden lighting. Behind a glass display case, three identical pink-frosted cupcakes sit in a row on the middle shelf, each in a white paper liner with a small sugar flower on top. The left cupcake's flower is slightly tilted, the center one sits perfectly upright, and the right one has a tiny bite-sized crumb fallen beside it on the shelf. A baker with a flour-dusted apron and a warm smile stands behind the marble counter, holding a pair of tongs. The chalkboard menu on the wall behind lists items in colorful chalk. Other pastries — croissants, muffins, and cookies — fill the other shelves of the display case.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place cupcake_1 on the middle shelf (left), with sugar flower slightly tilted. Place cupcake_2 on the shelf (center), sitting perfectly upright. Place cupcake_3 on the shelf (right), with a tiny crumb fallen beside it. Place baker behind the marble counter, standing and holding tongs, smiling.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, a floor made of large, light brown rectangular tiles spans the bottom of the scene. Above the floor sits a large bakery display case with a curved glass front and a wooden frame. The base of the display case features a white and gray marble-patterned panel. Inside the case, there are three transparent glass shelves. On the top shelf, from left to right, sit three cupcakes. The cupcake on the left, cupcake_1, has tall, swirled pink frosting topped with a single dark brown berry and is held in a dark brown paper liner decorated with a yellow floral pattern. In the center of the top shelf is cupcake_2, which has swirled pink frosting with small red sprinkles, a red cherry with a green stem on top, and a light tan pleated paper liner. To the right on the same shelf is cupcake_3, which is identical to cupcake_2 with pink frosting, red sprinkles, a cherry on top, and a tan liner; a few small brown crumbs lie on the glass shelf just to its right. Behind the display case stands the baker, a young man with short brown hair and a smiling expression. He wears a green long-sleeved shirt and a white apron that covers his torso. He is positioned slightly to the right of center and holds a pair of wooden tongs in his right hand. To the left of the display case is a green counter with gold trim, topped with a potted plant featuring yellow-orange leaves. Above this counter, a wooden shelf holds a white jar, a clear glass bottle filled with liquid, and a cluster of green foliage. To the right of the display case is another green counter with gold trim, upon which sits a light blue cash register. Above the register are two wooden shelves; the upper shelf holds three jars with various colored lids, and the lower shelf holds three small potted plants. The background wall consists of vertical light brown wood panels. Centered on the wall behind the baker is a large rectangular chalkboard with a wooden frame, featuring white cursive writing and decorative scrollwork at the corners. In the upper left and upper right corners of the scene, bundles of dried yellow and green leaves hang from the wall. The overall setting is a brightly lit, warm interior of a bakery during the daytime.

a smiling baker wearing a white apron

the baker feels proud of his cupcakes

the baker is preparing to use the tongs
A: the baker is holding wooden tongs
the baker is smiling at the shop
three cupcakes sit on the top shelf
CO: the display case is almost empty
the bakery is ready for business

a large curved glass display case
a white and gray marble panel
a dark chalkboard with white writing
